'''rochabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctipelagic|nyctipelagic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctipelagic|nyctipelagic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rochabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rochabithi|rochabithi]] || [[word:rochabiji|rochabiji]] || [[word:rochabishi|rochabishi]] || [[word:rochabiki|rochabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rochabuthuthu|rochabuthuthu]] || [[word:rochabujuju|rochabujuju]] || [[word:rochabushushu|rochabushushu]] || [[word:rochabukuku|rochabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rochabuthu|rochabuthu]] || [[word:rochabuju|rochabuju]] || [[word:rochabushu|rochabushu]] || [[word:rochabuku|rochabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rochabufthuf|rochabufthuf]] || [[word:rochabufjuf|rochabufjuf]] || [[word:rochabufshuf|rochabufshuf]] || [[word:rochabufkuf|rochabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rochabethe|rochabethe]] || [[word:rochabeje|rochabeje]] || [[word:rochabeshe|rochabeshe]] || [[word:rochabeke|rochabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rochabothotho|rochabothotho]] || [[word:rochabojojo|rochabojojo]] || [[word:rochaboshosho|rochaboshosho]] || [[word:rochabokoko|rochabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rochabotho|rochabotho]] || [[word:rochabojo|rochabojo]] || [[word:rochabosho|rochabosho]] || [[word:rochaboko|rochaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rochabofthof|rochabofthof]] || [[word:rochabofjof|rochabofjof]] || [[word:rochabofshof|rochabofshof]] || [[word:rochabofkof|rochabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rochabïfthïf|rochabïfthïf]] || [[word:rochabïfjïf|rochabïfjïf]] || [[word:rochabïfshïf|rochabïfshïf]] || [[word:rochabïfkïf|rochabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rochabïfthïfthïf|rochabïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:rochabïfjïfjïf|rochabïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:rochabïfshïfshïf|rochabïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:rochabïfkïfkïf|rochabïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rochabïfthïf|rochabïfthïf]] || [[word:rochabïfjïf|rochabïfjïf]] || [[word:rochabïfshïf|rochabïfshïf]] || [[word:rochabïfkïf|rochabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rochabïfthïf|rochabïfthïf]] || [[word:rochabïfjïf|rochabïfjïf]] || [[word:rochabïfshïf|rochabïfshïf]] || [[word:rochabïfkïf|rochabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rochabæthæ|rochabæthæ]] || [[word:rochabæjæ|rochabæjæ]] || [[word:rochabæshæ|rochabæshæ]] || [[word:rochabækæ|rochabækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rochabathatha|rochabathatha]] || [[word:rochabajaja|rochabajaja]] || [[word:rochabashasha|rochabashasha]] || [[word:rochabakaka|rochabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rochabatha|rochabatha]] || [[word:rochabaja|rochabaja]] || [[word:rochabasha|rochabasha]] || [[word:rochabaka|rochabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rochabafthaf|rochabafthaf]] || [[word:rochabafjaf|rochabafjaf]] || [[word:rochabafshaf|rochabafshaf]] || [[word:rochabafkaf|rochabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rochabasha|rochabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rochabshësha|rochabshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rochabrosha|rochabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rochabmusha|rochabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rochabyasha|rochabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorochabnkshësha|gorochabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorochabnkrosha|gorochabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorochabnkmusha|gorochabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorochabnkyasha|gorochabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rochachabasha|rochachabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rochachabshësha|rochachabshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rochachabrosha|rochachabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rochachabmusha|rochachabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rochachabyasha|rochachabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorochachabnkshësha|gorochachabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorochachabnkrosha|gorochachabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorochachabnkmusha|gorochachabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorochachabnkyasha|gorochachabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rechæbasha|rechæbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rechæbshësha|rechæbshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rechæbrosha|rechæbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rechæbmusha|rechæbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rechæbyasha|rechæbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorechæbnkshësha|gorechæbnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorechæbnkrosha|gorechæbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorechæbnkmusha|gorechæbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorechæbnkyasha|gorechæbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rochfabasha|rochfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rochfabshësha|rochfabshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rochfabrosha|rochfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rochfabmusha|rochfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rochfabyasha|rochfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorochfabnkshësha|gorochfabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorochfabnkrosha|gorochfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorochfabnkmusha|gorochfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorochfabnkyasha|gorochfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
